reason: Ipswich are in excellent form with strong home attacking metrics (xG ~1.8) and solid defensive numbers, while Birmingham struggle away and lack consistent goal threat, making a home win or draw highly probable.
Leicester have superior squad depth and better xG trends compared to Sheffield Wednesday, who remain inconsistent defensively; Leicester avoiding defeat is statistically likely.
Chelsea Women maintain dominant form with elite attacking xG and strong defensive structure, while Tottenham struggle against top-tier opposition and have poor head-to-head results.
